title: onosma fastigiata subsp. catalaunica
intro: Onosma fastigiata subsp. catalaunica is a plant species, also known as catalan onosma, which belongs to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by infusing its leaves in water or making a tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
